key_points: Natural numbers are counting numbers starting from 1
Whole numbers include natural numbers along with zero
Integers include positive numbers, negative numbers and zero
Rational numbers can be written as a fraction p/q where q ≠ 0
Numbers can be represented and compared using a number line
exam_tips: Remember that natural numbers start from 1 while whole numbers start from 0
Negative numbers are included only in integers
Use number lines to compare integers easily
Always check that the denominator is not zero in rational numbers
